counters.note: KILL ORDER: Death Trooper Terentatek (DTT) first. Must break the protection engine.
Focus Enoch to stop 'Decay' stacks. Avoid Drogan special into Protection Up.
Rex's TM gain is essential. Use GAS to reset MQG cooldowns.
Insta-kill Master Qui-Gon immediately.
TRAP: Bane has no GAC Omi here. You will get stun-locked and time out.
Target Sabine first. Do not target Ezra Exile while her Omi is active.
Mod for higher mastery/speed than opponent.
Resilient Meditation prevents the Thermal Detonator death-loop.
Whistling Birds bypass Krrsantan's massive defense/taunt.
Nighttrooper damage ignores Protection. Doom Phalanx immediately.
Kill Shield Generator first. Use AoEs while Phalanx is taunting.
Reset Juhani's cooldowns. Without her special, the team is mortal.
TRAP: Wampa lacks GAC buffs. This is a guaranteed fail.
Insta-kill Spirit. Use cleanses to stay above 'Doom' thresholds.
Swipe through revives. High relic check required.
Safest way to absorb the initial Seven Sisters onslaught.
Rex speed allows Phoenix to out-cycle and daze.
STAP True Damage ignores the massive Protection recovery.
Savage needs R7+ to survive the initial burst.
Must outspeed Rex. Focus Rex immediately.
Fear controls the TM gain; Malak can solo smaller builds.
